rationale: Gov't Code §2306.007 governs municipal designation of economically depressed or blighted areas and is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: To establish an economically depressed or blighted area under Section 2306.004(6)(B) or (C), the governing body of a municipality must hold a public hearing and find that the area:
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and this municipal blighted-area designation statute.
